title: Xeroflame's tokyo
description: this is a tokyo ghoul inspired texture pack for pvp!
body:
this is a tokyo ghoul inspired texture pack!

tokyo ghoul is a really popular anime in the community and loved by the watchers!

this pack's main colors are red,black and white which make a really good contrast for a pvper!

gamemodes that match with the resource pack:
-SMP
-Dia SMP
-Spear Elytra or Spear Mace
-Sword
-Mace
